messages.applyImmediately: Changes apply immediately and stay active after restart.

stateUnavailable.title: Launcher state unavailable
stateUnavailable.body: Lumorix could not initialize local storage. Check folder permissions and restart.

itemNotFound.title: Item not found
itemNotFound.body: The catalog entry is no longer available.

hero.title: Your local Lumorix control center
hero.body: Track your collection, pick up where you left off, and keep installs and launcher updates under control without accounts, ads, or friction.
hero.profileBody: Name, avatar, and style stay local to this device. You can change the look any time and update the name every 30 days.

recentActivity.title: What changed lately
recentActivity.empty: No recent activity yet. Add something from the Shop to get started.

recentlyUsed.title: Jump back in
recentlyUsed.empty: Launch an installed item and it will appear here for quick access.

recentInstalls.title: Ready on this machine
recentInstalls.empty: Installed items will show up here once a download or setup finishes.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.discoverBody: Browse new content and add it to your Library.
nextSteps.manageBody: Launch, update, repair, or uninstall from your collection.
nextSteps.settingsBody: Review library folders, privacy defaults, and update behavior.

intro.title: Find Lumorix content worth keeping locally
intro.titlePersonalized: {{name}}, more like {{game}} is already lining up
intro.body: The Shop is your discovery layer. Add what you want to your Library, then install or update it on your terms.
intro.bodyPersonalized: We tuned the Shop a little closer to {{game}} so you can reach matching games and tools faster.

recommendations.forYouBody: Weighted tag matches across your library shape these picks.
recommendations.becausePlayedBody: These picks share the strongest structured tags with your recent session.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, developer, tag, or category

emptyState.emptyBody: Check back soon for new Lumorix content.
emptyState.filteredBody: Try another search, clear a filter, or explore a different category.

sparseState.title: A new game is rolling in
sparseState.body: A mysterious train game is on the way. No timetable, no details yet. Arrival: mid 2027.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search your library by name, developer, tag, or category

toolbar.title: Own your local platform
toolbar.body: Sort, filter, launch, update, uninstall, and clean up your Library without losing track of what belongs to you.

card.removeHint: Installed entries stay removable only after uninstalling their local files first.
card.transferHint: Wait for the active transfer to finish before uninstalling or removing this item.

removeDialog.title: Remove {{name}} from your Library?
removeDialog.body: This removes the Library entry and its quick actions, but does not delete installed files.
removeDialog.keepInstalledFiles: Installed files are left untouched. Only the Library entry is removed.

uninstallDialog.title: Uninstall {{name}}?
uninstallDialog.body: This removes the installed files from disk but keeps the item in your Library for reinstalling later.
uninstallDialog.removeFiles: Installed files in the selected Library folder will be deleted.
uninstallDialog.keepLibraryEntry: The Library entry stays available so you can reinstall, update, or remove it later.

emptyState.emptyBody: Your library is empty. Discover content in the Shop.
emptyState.filteredBody: No Library items match the current search or filters. Clear them or head back to the Shop for more content.

groups.empty: No collections yet. Create one above!

emptyState.title: No active downloads
emptyState.body: Installs, updates, repairs, and moves will appear here when they start.

summary.pendingPayloadDescription: Remaining data across active and queued transfers

header.title: Socials
header.subtitle: Connect with Lumorix and stay updated on projects and development

hero.body: A local-first Windows launcher for private installs, explicit updates, and clear local ownership across Lumorix games, tools, and projects.

privacy.title: Privacy baseline
privacy.body: No login system, no analytics package, and no automatic data upload path.

onboarding.title: Your Lumorix content stays on your machine.
onboarding.body: Choose where Lumorix installs content. No account, no cloud lock-in, no hidden analytics. Network access is reserved for manifests, downloads, and explicit update checks.

webPathDialog.title: Set library path
webPathDialog.body: The browser preview has no native folder picker. Enter the install path directly so the onboarding flow still behaves realistically.
webPathDialog.hint: Tip: In browser preview this path is simulated so you can test the full flow without leaving the page.

privacyPoints.libraries: Multiple libraries can be added later

personalization.title: Name and style
personalization.description: Make the launcher feel more like yours with a personal name and theme.
personalization.nameDescription: Used in greetings and personal home copy.
personalization.nameMissing: No name saved yet. Lumorix will keep asking on startup until you set one.
personalization.nameReady: Your display name can be updated now.
personalization.nameLockedUntil: Your display name can be changed again on {{date}}.
personalization.themeDescription: Switch instantly between three personal visual moods.
personalization.avatarDescription: A compact symbol for the top bar, home, and personal cards.
personalization.favoriteDescription: Used as a personal anchor in Shop and About.
personalization.favoriteHint: You can change the focus any time or leave it empty.
personalization.favoriteEmpty: Once games are available in the launcher, you can highlight one here.

accentColor.title: Custom Accent Color
accentColor.description: Override the accent color used across the launcher.

colorMode.title: Color mode
colorMode.description: Choose between system, dark, or light mode.

signal.name: Signal
signal.description: Bright and light with a spark-first feel.

ember.name: Ember
ember.description: Warmer, sharper, and a little more aggressive.

scout.name: Scout
scout.description: Calmer and more directional than flashy.

sunset.name: Sunset Drift
sunset.description: Warmer orange tones with late-night arcade energy.

ocean.name: Ocean Signal
ocean.description: Cool cyan-blue tones with a calmer dashboard feel.

profiles.title: Your profiles
profiles.description: Switch between separate identities. Each profile keeps its own name, avatar, theme, and favorite game.

language.title: Launcher language
language.description: Choose the launcher language. You can change it at any time.
language.helper: Changes apply immediately and are stored on this device.

storage.title: Libraries
storage.previewHint: In browser preview, library paths are simulated so the full storage flow stays testable.

webPathDialog.title: Enter library path
webPathDialog.body: The browser preview cannot open a native folder picker. Enter the library path directly to keep the storage flow realistic.
webPathDialog.hint: This path is simulated locally in preview and will map to real folder selection in the Tauri build.

toggles.askForLibraryEachInstall: Ask for library on every install

gameRefresh.checkingBody: Refreshing catalog data, verifying installs, and recalculating game status.

privacy.title: No telemetry
privacy.headline: Accounts, analytics, and crash uploads are disabled.
privacy.body: Network is only used for manifest checks, downloads, and explicit update checks.

personalizationDialog.title: How should Lumorix greet you?
personalizationDialog.body: Adjust your name and style whenever you want to retune the launcher later.
personalizationDialog.requiredBody: Before you continue, give Lumorix your name. This dialog will return on every startup until one is saved.
personalizationDialog.namePlaceholder: For example Julia, Captain, Player One
personalizationDialog.avatarLabel: Pick an avatar mark right away
personalizationDialog.avatarBody: This mark shows up later in the top bar and personal sections.
personalizationDialog.themeLabel: Pick a style to start with
personalizationDialog.themeBody: You can switch styles any time later in Settings.
personalizationDialog.note: After the first save, display name changes are available every 30 days.

installedPanel.notAdded: Add this item to your Library before installing it.
installedPanel.notInstalled: Added to your Library, but not installed yet.
installedPanel.unavailable: This item is currently unavailable in the Shop and cannot be reinstalled right now.
installedPanel.previewHint: Browser preview cannot open a real folder, so Lumorix copies the install path instead.

detail.changelogEmpty: No changelog is available for this item right now.

similar.title: More like this
similar.body: These recommendations rank highest on weighted tag overlap.

installDialog.noLibrariesBody: Add or reconnect a library in Settings before installing this item.

moveDialog.noLibrariesBody: Add a second library in Settings to move this game to a different location.
moveDialog.savesPreserved: Game saves and progress are preserved during the move.

statuses.restartRequired: Update installed, but relaunch failed. Please restart Lumorix manually.
statuses.none: No update available. Lumorix is up to date.
statuses.desktopOnly: In-app updates are only available in the desktop app.

details.desktopOnly: In browser preview you can verify the update flow, but download and install only work in the desktop app.
details.none: No further action is needed. This launcher build already matches the latest available release.
details.restartRequired: The update files are installed, but Lumorix could not relaunch itself. A manual restart will finish the update.

offline.banner: No internet connection - manifests and updates unavailable

backup.title: Export Library Config
backup.description: Export your installed games list and preferences to a JSON file.

feed.empty: No changelogs found — install games to see update history here.
